creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
In the Wayback Machine: 

<https://web.archive.org/web/20171222203012/https://www.freebsd.org/multimedia/>

Some of what's there might be good here: 

<https://papers.freebsd.org/>

----

Random pick: 'An Overview of Locking in the FreeBSD Kernel', presented at BSDCan 2012, the event is missing from <https://papers.freebsd.org/2012/> but the presentation is mentioned in three blog posts: 

* <https://freebsdfoundation.org/blog/bsdcan-trip-report-marius-strobl/>
* <https://freebsdfoundation.org/blog/bsdcan-trip-report-brooks-davis/>
* <https://freebsdfoundation.org/blog/bsdcan-trip-report-florian-smeets-2/>
